title: × cuprocyparis notabilis
intro: × Cuprocyparis notabilis, also known as a hybrid cypress, is a plant species resulting from the cross-breeding of two different cypress tree species. The essential oil extracted from the needles of × Cuprocyparis notabilis has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the essential oil from × Cuprocyparis notabilis can be used in aromatherapy, or applied topically in the form of a massage oil or cream.
